title: [FIRRTL] memory configuration file should be emitted even when empty
body:
When we specify an output file for `repl-seq-mem` we should always output the conf file even if its empty.

Relevant line of code here: https://github.com/llvm/circt/blob/eafba50792dca320c0361e3eafd7791b4318e6cb/lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/Transforms/CreateSiFiveMetadata.cpp#L200

h/t @ngraybeal
